CONFIDENTIAL — Project Forest

To: Sustainability Reporting
From: General Counsel
Date: 24 May 2026

Re: FY 2025 ISSB IFRS S2 disclosure pre-read

Embargoed until 8am SGT, 30 June 2026.

Scope 1 emissions for FY 2025 came in at 1,240,000 tCO2e — materially above the prior
guidance figure. Scope 2 emissions are flat. Scope 3 category 11 (use of sold products)
remains under recalculation; the value-chain emissions methodology change is the driver.

Management is considering whether to restate prior-year Scope 2 figures and to
change the baseline year to 2019 in light of the methodology revision. Independent
assurance will be issued as a qualified opinion on sustainability for FY 2025.
